title: Oasis Stainless Steel Multi Purpose Floral Scissor x1
description: Product Description OASIS® Floral Products Multipurpose Scissors are manufactured to the highest standard using only high quality materials, these multipurpose scissors are suitable for left and right handed users and are ergonomically designed for comfort and ease of use, reducing the stresses on the hand from long periods of use. The bright yellow durable plastic handle allows you to easily find the scissors on a busy workbench. The Serrated stainless steel blades allow you to cut through finer-gauge wires as well as stems and gives a clean sharp cut. A knife is the extension of a florist’s hand, and without good cutting tools it would be impossible to work. The old saying ‘A bad workman always blames his tools’ no longer applies as the OASIS® Floral Products range is the largest collection of cutting tools especially designed for working with flowers. OASIS® Floral Products Tools range from scissors and knives, to wire tools, garden tools and stem strippers. Since their earliest days in 1954, when V.L. Smithers revolutionised the floral industry with the creation of water-absorbing foam for florists, Smithers-Oasis has grown into a leading global manufacturer and marketer of floral foam, floral accessory products, cellular growing media, and postharvest products. Today, OASIS® is the most recognised and trusted brand in the floral industry. Box Contains 1 x OASIS® Stainless Steel Multi Purpose Scissor
